'''Ohvan''' was an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who used an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-web]] at the [[Battle of Keskin]] alongside [[Reydon]]. Ohvan was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the fighting.
